sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in sources

special_mechanics.name: Item collection
special_mechanics.description: Player can collect various power-up items including horse for extra protection, boots for increased movement speed, bullets for faster shots, yashichi for extra life, and rifle for longer shot range

special_mechanics.name: Directional shooting
special_mechanics.description: Player uses three buttons to shoot left, right, and center. Can change shooting direction through button combinations. Alt control method available: D-Pad aiming (unlockable via button code)

special_mechanics.name: Auto-scrolling
special_mechanics.description: Screen automatically scrolls upward throughout gameplay

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative classification. Gun.Smoke is a run-and-gun shmup with fixed vertical scrolling. No detailed physics parameters (gravity, velocity, acceleration values) are documented in available sources. Game mechanics focus on horizontal movement within scrolling screen and directional shooting rather than complex platforming physics. Movement enhanced by collectible boots item.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Gun.Smoke (NES, Famicom Disk System)
